summary: Tightened the Chapter 2 handoff by carrying Sloan's number into the opening, and let the chapter exit on Jo flipping the sign to MEMBERS so the Chapter 4 opening lands more directly.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to link Mira's arrival at Blue Hour directly to Sloan's number from Chapter 2.
Removed the repeated Sloan's-number mention from the next paragraph while keeping the badge detail.
Reordered the last beat so the chapter closes on the MEMBERS sign flip and Jo naming the desk.
